macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Amgen Q1 2026 Earnings Beat Expectations Despite Stock Decline
items.summary: Amgen reported Q1 2026 EPS of $5.15, beating forecasts by 7.29%, with revenue of $8.62 billion slightly above the expected $8.59 billion. However, the stock fell 2.43% in after-hours trading following the announcement.

items.title: Solana ETFs See Significant Inflows as Wall Street Interest Grows
items.summary: Spot Solana ETFs attracted approximately $33 million in net inflows over the past week, including a strong $6.7 million surge on Thursday, indicating growing institutional interest in the cryptocurrency.

items.title: U.S. Congressman Proposes Bitcoin Reserve Bill with Capital Gains Tax Elimination
items.summary: A U.S. Congressman has proposed legislation to establish a Bitcoin reserve while eliminating capital gains taxes on Bitcoin transactions, signaling potential policy shifts toward cryptocurrency.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Experiences $202 Million in Liquidations Over 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market witnessed $202 million in liquidations, with short positions accounting for $153 million and long positions for $49.065 million. Bitcoin and Ethereum experienced significant liquidations, with 81,778 traders liquidated globally, and the largest single liquidation occurring on Hyperliquid's SOL-USD pair valued at $4.6826 million.

items.title: Bitcoin Briefly Slips Below $80,000 but Options Traders Remain Bullish
items.summary: Bitcoin experienced a brief dip below $80,000 during the past 24 hours but quickly rebounded following positive market sentiment. Options traders are betting the pullback won't last, with on-chain metrics and resilient options markets pointing toward a potential structural breakout.

items.title: Trump Announces Russia-Ukraine Ceasefire, Bitcoin Rallies to $80K
items.summary: US President Trump announced a three-day ceasefire between Russia and Ukraine, which positively impacted the cryptocurrency market. Bitcoin rallied approximately $1,000 following the announcement, with altcoins including ONDO, SIREN, JUP, ICP, and VVV seeing impressive double-digit gains.

items.title: DeepBook (DEEP) Surges 23% Following Predict Debut
items.summary: DeepBook token rallied more than 23% in the last 24 hours, significantly outperforming the broader crypto market which was up only 0.70%. The surge was primarily driven by the new Predict product launch, with DEEP breaking out of a 100-day consolidation period.

items.title: Bybit Expands Perpetual Contracts to Include TradFi Assets
items.summary: Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, has expanded its perpetual contracts offerings to include seven new traditional finance assets, including US stocks and global ETFs covering Asian markets.

items.title: Ethereum Whales Begin Selling Despite Market Strength
items.summary: While Bitcoin targets $200,000 with macro strength and XRP draws significant investment, Ethereum whales are actively selling positions. Market analysts express concerns about TON volatility and potential centralization issues related to ETF inflows.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: The Division 2 Bloody Red Hunter Returns with New Title Update
items.summary: Weekend news update highlights the return of the Bloody Red Hunter and a new title update for The Division 2, discussing what players can expect next.

items.title: Star Citizen Reveals 2026 Plans Including Ship Updates and Odin Battle Cruiser
items.summary: Major announcements for Star Citizen in 2026 include ship reveals like the Odin Battle Cruiser, detailed plans, potential delays, and a return to the game.

items.title: Phasmophobia Big Fix Patch Arrives May 12th with Alan Wake Event
items.summary: A significant fix patch for Phasmophobia is set for May 12th, coinciding with the Alan Wake event, addressing key issues in the co-op ghost hunting game.

items.title: Resident Evil Requiem VR Mod Adds Manual Reloading and Full Body Presence
items.summary: The latest VR mod update for Resident Evil Requiem introduces manual reloading for pistols and SMGs, full body presence, holsters, performance boosts, and visual upgrades, making it feel like a native VR experience.

items.title: Nintendo Announces Rhythm Heaven for Switch 2 on July 2nd, 2026
items.summary: Nintendo revealed Rhythm Heaven releasing July 2nd, 2026, on Switch 2, alongside Tomodachi Life selling over 3.8 million units in two weeks.

items.title: Vitality Wins BLAST Rivals Grand Slam, Debated as Greatest Esports Team Ever
items.summary: Vitality completes the BLAST Rivals Fort Worth Grand Slam on May 9th, sparking debate on whether they are the greatest esports team in history, surpassing NaVi in recent finals; discussion also covers CS2 animgraph2 update.
items.source: YouTube - Thorin and Pimp Esports Podcast

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Apple AirPods with Built-in Camera in Final Testing Stage
items.summary: Apple's new AirPods featuring an integrated camera are currently in the final testing phase, according to analyst Mark Gurman, signaling the company's continued innovation in wearable design.

items.title: Microsoft's New CPU Trick Addresses Windows 11 App Stutters
items.summary: Microsoft has introduced a new Low Latency Profile and K2 project designed to fix performance issues and app stuttering in Windows 11.

items.title: Samsung Producing Advanced OLED Panels for iPhone 18 Pro Series
items.summary: Samsung has begun manufacturing advanced OLED display panels for Apple's upcoming iPhone 18 Pro lineup.

items.title: Meta Removes End-to-End Encryption from Instagram Direct Messages
items.summary: Instagram is shutting down end-to-end encryption for direct messages, giving Meta access to chat content starting today.

items.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Can Predict Fainting Up to 5 Minutes in Advance
items.summary: Samsung announced that its Galaxy Watch can now predict fainting episodes up to five minutes before they occur using advanced health monitoring technology.

items.title: JDownloader Website Hacked to Distribute Python RAT Malware
items.summary: The JDownloader download manager website was compromised to distribute malicious Windows and Linux installers containing a Python-based remote access trojan.

items.title: NVIDIA Confirms GeForce NOW Data Breach Affecting Armenian Users
items.summary: NVIDIA has confirmed that user information from GeForce NOW has been exposed in a data breach affecting Armenian users.

items.title: Coinbase Experiences Service Disruption Due to AWS Regional Failure
items.summary: Crypto trading platform Coinbase went down due to increased temperatures causing a regional failure in AWS US-EAST-1 region, though the outage has since been resolved.

items.title: Instructure Hackers Claim Data Theft from Nearly 9,000 Schools
items.summary: Hackers claim to have stolen data from nearly 9,000 schools through the Canvas learning management platform and have set a May 12 deadline for ransom negotiations.

items.title: Intel Signs Preliminary Deal to Produce Chips for Apple
items.summary: Intel has reportedly signed a preliminary agreement to manufacture chips for Apple, marking a significant partnership between the two tech giants.
